indications.text:
GEODON is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia, as monotherapy for the acute treatment of bipolar manic or mixed episodes, and as an adjunct to
lithium or valproate for the maintenance treatment of bipolar disorder. GEODON intramuscular is indicated for acute agitation in schizophrenic patie...

Ziprasidone is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia. When deciding among the alternative
treatments available for this condition, the prescriber should consider the finding of ziprasidone’s
